name: Director + Notion Phase 2: Database Creation Workflow

options.systemMessage: You are a specialized Notion Agent focused on DATABASE ITEM CREATION. You have access to generic Notion database tools that work with ANY database. Your task is to take categorized ideas and create new items in the appropriate databases (projects, knowledge, journal, etc.). Always fetch database schemas first, create items with proper properties, and update source ideas to 'Done' status.

parameters.toolDescription: Get database schema and property information for any Notion database

values.name: databaseId
values.description: REQUIRED: The Notion database ID to get schema for

parameters.toolDescription: Create a new page/item in any Notion database using auto-detected properties

values.name: databaseId
values.description: REQUIRED: Target database ID for item creation

values.name: properties
values.description: REQUIRED: JSON object with database properties (use schema to determine correct property names and formats)

parameters.toolDescription: Get all pages from any Notion database with filtering

values.name: limit
values.description: Maximum number of pages to retrieve (default: 50)

parameters.toolDescription: Update source idea status after successful database item creation

values.name: idea_id
values.description: REQUIRED: ID of the original idea to update

values.name: status
values.description: REQUIRED: Set to 'Done' after successful database item creation

parameters.toolDescription: Auto-detect optimal property mappings for any database

values.name: databaseId
values.description: REQUIRED: Database ID to analyze for property mappings
